# concrete-pump-cpa-mcp

> CPA Concrete Pumping Group standards, pump operator certification, BS EN 12001 ground bearing capacity, exclusion zones.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- check_cpa_compliance
- operator_cert_check
- calculate_ground_bearing
- exclusion_zone_check
- pre_pour_checklist

## Install
```
pip install concrete-pump-cpa-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/concrete-pump-cpa-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
